project.objective: Using Kentucky death certificates, determine the date and place of death of Elijah Wilkins of Muhlenberg County, Kentucky (born c. 1814), and what information confirms his identity

questions.question: Using Kentucky death certificates, what were the date and place of death of Elijah Wilkins (b. c. 1814, Muhlenberg County, Kentucky)?
questions.rationale: Primary research objective. The census trail (last residence fact 1870, Muhlenberg County) goes cold after 1870, suggesting a death in the 1870s-1880s — but the question presupposes death certificates, and the survey must establish whether Kentucky certificates even cover that era.
